title: A school trip to the coast
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last week, our geography class went on a trip to the coast. We travelled there (27) coach and arrived just before ten o’clock. The teacher asked us to look carefully at the cliffs and make notes about the rocks. Although the wind was strong, everyone enjoyed walking along the beach. We found several shells and small stones which had been carried there (28) the sea. Later, we had lunch in a small café near the harbour. I sat beside a friend who knows much more (29) geography than I do, so he helped me with my notes. The afternoon activity was easier (30) the morning one because we only had to draw a map of the area. Before we left, our teacher reminded us to check whether we had collected everything (31) our bags. I learned a lot during the trip, and I was pleased (32) my work.
